question_text:
In commit a0f7cba on 2026-07-07, you wrote line 17 of gradebook/analytics.py:
17:     elif score >= 70:

Consider changing `score >= 70` to `score > 70`.

After changing the C-grade condition from `score >= 70` to `score > 70`, what happens for a score at the lower C-grade boundary, and why does the condition sequence produce that result?
